findings.textValue:
IF(OR(ISPICKVAL( SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__Type__c, 'Quote'),ISPICKVAL( SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__Type__c, 'eCommerce Request')),
	'New', 
	IF(ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__Type__c, 'Amendment'), 
		IF(SBQQ__Quantity__c == 0,
			'Churn',
			 IF(SBQQ__NetTotal__c > 0,
				'Expansion',
				IF(SBQQ__NetTotal__c == 0,
					'No Change',
					'Contraction'))),
		IF(ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__Type__c, 'Renewal'), 
			IF(SBQQ__Quantity__c == 0, 
				'Renewal Churn', 
				IF(SBQQ__Quantity__c - SBQQ__RenewedSubscription__r.SBQQ__Quantity__c > 0,
					 'Renewal Expansion',
					  IF(SBQQ__Quantity__c - SBQQ__RenewedSubscription__r.SBQQ__Quantity__c < 0,
						 'Renewal Contraction', 
						  'Straight Renewal'))),
			 'Re-Quote')))
